name: Quarterly or Annual Excise Tax Deferral

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who reasonably expect to be liable for not more than $50,000 (quarterly) or $1,000 (annually) in alcohol excise taxes for the calendar year.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows smaller taxpayers to pay excise taxes quarterly (if liability is <$50k) or annually (if liability is <$1k) rather than semimonthly.
